title: Human Resources Specialists
description: Recruit, screen, interview, or place individuals within an organization. May perform other activities in multiple human resources areas.

tasks.text: Interpret and explain human resources policies, procedures, laws, standards, or regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hire employees and process hiring-related paperwork.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain current knowledge of Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and affirmative action guidelines and laws, such as the Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA).
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare or maintain employment records related to events, such as hiring, termination, leaves, transfers, or promotions, using human resources management system software.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Address employee relations issues, such as harassment allegations, work complaints, or other employee concerns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review employment applications and job orders to match applicants with job requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inform job applicants of details such as duties and responsibilities, compensation, benefits, schedules, working conditions, or promotion opportunities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select qualified job applicants or refer them to managers, making hiring recommendations when appropriate.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule or conduct new employee orientations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain and update human resources documents, such as organizational charts, employee handbooks or directories, or performance evaluation forms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with management to develop or implement personnel policies or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contact job applicants to inform them of the status of their applications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct exit interviews and ensure that necessary employment termination paperwork is completed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview job applicants to obtain information on work history, training, education, or job skills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform searches for qualified job candidates, using sources such as computer databases, networking, Internet recruiting resources, media advertisements, job fairs, recruiting firms, or employee referrals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide management with information or training related to interviewing, performance appraisals, counseling techniques, or documentation of performance issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze employment-related data and prepare required reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Advise management on organizing, preparing, or implementing recruiting or retention programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or implement recruiting strategies to meet current or anticipated staffing needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer employee benefit plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule or administer skill, intelligence, psychological, or drug tests for current or prospective employees.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct reference or background checks on job applicants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review and evaluate applicant qualifications or eligibility for specified licensing, according to established guidelines and designated licensing codes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate recruitment or selection criteria to ensure conformance to professional, statistical, or testing standards, recommending revisions, as needed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate with outside staffing agencies to secure temporary employees, based on departmental needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate selection or testing techniques by conducting research or follow-up activities and conferring with management or supervisory personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
